content: These criteria never improved across 2 iterations and scored <70% — may be unmeasurable or need clearer measurements: journal_entry_test_design_rigor, benfords_law_implementation_precision, saas_revenue_recognition_manipulation_detection, internal_control_deficiency_root_cause_analysis, comparative_period_variance_decomposition_rigor, red_flag_indicator_statistical_clustering
task: Write a forensic accounting memo analyzing suspected revenue manipulation at a mid-market SaaS company. Include journal entry analysis, Benfords Law testing, timeline reconstruction, and quantified financial impact.
